title: Desk Lamp with USB Ports (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™
description_text:
Illuminate your favorite reading nook with this USB Ports Desk Lamp from Threshold™. Boasting an oval glass shade with a wooden base, this lamp adds a touch of natural appeal to your home decor while illuminating your space with just the right amount of light. The non-removable integrated LED bulb creates a soft glow, while the full-range dimmable setting allows you to create the perfect ambiance. Place it on the side table next to your sofa or on a console table in your living room for an inviting look, and use the two USB ports to charge your devices.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
bullet_text: Includes: 1 Desk Task Lamp, Integrated LED Bulb(s) (Non-Removable)
Assembly Details: Adult Assembly Required, Tools Provided
Assembled Dimensions: 6.52 Inches (H) x 4.85 Inches (W) x 4.84 Inches (D)
Base Dimensions: 1.57 Inches (H) x 3.54 Inches (W) x 3.54 Inches (D)
Lighting Switch Type: Base Turn Knob Rotary Switch
Warranty: 1 Year Limited Warranty. To obtain a copy of the manufacturer's or supplier's warranty for this item prior to purchasing the item, please call Target Guest Services at 1-800-591-3869
